goal: Move real-web gauntlet pass rate above 26/30 by fixing the LLM-visibility bottleneck (not by iterating)
lastClosedReason: Gen 9 LLM-iteration approach: no pass-rate gain at n=3, reddit cost regression $0.015 -> $0.25/$0.32 in 5-rep validation (death-spiral recovery loops). PR #59 closed, branch unmerged.
